stemHtml: When using airborne weather radar in the mapping mode in polar areas one runs the risk of..

options.a: aurora borealis (polar light) causing false returns.
options.b: getting a distorted picture because of ice reflection.
options.c: mistaking the edge of coastal ice off shore for the real coastline.
options.d: underestimating distances because the cold seawater is causing super-refraction.
